summary: Both REQ-1 and REQ-2 appear to be implemented. The products.ts file summary confirms 19 new raw crystal forms (starting ₹600) and 19 new bracelet forms (starting ₹800) were added. The Appointment.tsx file was modified and the UPI ID 9305831180@pthdfc is present in the code. However, the diff does not show the actual QR code img src update in Appointment.tsx (file was truncated), and the products.ts content is also truncated, so we cannot fully verify all 19 crystals and their exact prices/descriptions meet spec. Based on available evidence and the file summary statements, the implementation appears largely correct with minor verification gaps due to truncation.
